name: linus-level
description: A memorable agent strictness dial for tuning autonomy, questioning, security posture, and engineering discipline from vibe mode to maintainer mode.

interface.shortDescription: Tune coding agents from vibe mode to maintainer mode.
interface.longDescription: Linus Level gives Codex, Claude, and other coding agents a memorable 1.0-10.0 engineering strictness dial, inspired by software culture's idea of exacting maintainer review. It calibrates autonomy, assumption budget, clarifying questions, verification, security posture, DRY discipline, and maintainer-grade caution for each software task.
defaultPrompt: Use Linus Level 8.5 for this production codebase task.
Use Linus Level 2 for fast creative prototyping.
Calibrate this task with Linus Level before coding.
